parsedJson.summary: The site looks legitimate and established, but the above-the-fold experience makes it harder than necessary for a Brisbane roofing customer to call or request a quote quickly.

issues.title: Mobile phone number is hidden
issues.what_observed: On the mobile header, there is only a black phone icon beside the logo, with no visible phone number or call text.
issues.why_problem: A local-search visitor on their phone is often ready to call immediately, especially for roof repairs or quote requests. If they have to guess whether the icon is tappable or open the menu first, some will leave and call another roofer.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A mobile sticky header with a clearly labeled tap-to-call button such as 'Call 07 3506 2534' or a prominent green phone button with supporting text visible without scrolling.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the lone phone icon with a high-contrast sticky call button showing the number or 'Call Now', and keep it visible at the top of the mobile viewport.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机页面顶部只看到一个电话图标，看不到电话号码，客户不一定知道能不能点。
issues.customer_impact: 本地找屋顶维修的人很多是在手机上直接比较商家；如果电话不够明显，客户可能在几秒内返回 Google，点下一家公司。

issues.title: No quote button above fold on mobile
issues.what_observed: The mobile screenshot shows the headline, intro copy, review claim, and offer list, but no visible 'Get a Quote' or call-to-action button in the first screen.
issues.why_problem: The page builds interest but does not give the visitor an obvious next step. Someone searching 'roofer Brisbane' should be able to request help before reading a long list of services.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Below the mobile headline, show two large buttons: 'Call Now' and 'Get a Free Quote', followed by the review proof and service bullets.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Move a primary quote button and secondary call button directly under the hero headline on mobile, before the 'What we offer' list.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机首屏有很多介绍文字，但没有马上让客户联系你的按钮。
issues.customer_impact: 访客通常在前 8 秒决定要不要继续看；没有明显按钮，会让已经有需求的人少一步行动，询盘和电话都会流失。

issues.title: Hero lacks direct action
issues.what_observed: On desktop, the main hero card contains the large 'Metal Roofing Specialists' headline, review text, and bullet list, but no quote or call button inside the hero card.
issues.why_problem: The visitor sees a strong service message but must look back up to the navigation bar to act. That creates friction for a person quickly comparing roofing companies.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: The hero card should include a large primary 'Get a Free Quote' button and a secondary 'Call (07) 3506 2534' link directly below the trust text.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add two clear hero actions inside the white card: an orange or green quote button and a phone action, placed before the service bullet list.
issues.plain_explanation: 电脑页面主视觉区域讲得很清楚，但客户看到重点后没有立刻可以点的报价按钮。
issues.customer_impact: 客户越需要找按钮，越容易分心或离开；对从 Google 进来的流量来说，每多一步都会减少来电和报价表单。

issues.title: Navigation feels crowded
issues.what_observed: The desktop navigation contains multiple dropdown items, Projects, Testimonials, Contact, a large orange 'Get a Quote' button, and a search icon all in one row.
issues.why_problem: A roofing customer usually needs proof, service fit, and a fast way to call. Too many navigation choices make the page feel more like a directory than a focused local business page.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A simpler header with Services, Projects, Reviews, Contact, plus one dominant 'Get a Quote' button and the phone number.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Condense the header navigation into 4 core links, remove or de-emphasize the search icon, and keep quote plus phone as the visual priority.
issues.plain_explanation: 电脑顶部菜单东西太多，客户不知道应该先点哪里。
issues.customer_impact: 选择太多会让人犹豫；本地服务客户通常只想确认你靠谱、看案例、然后打电话，菜单复杂会降低行动速度。

issues.title: Search icon distracts from quote
issues.what_observed: A black search icon appears at the far right of the desktop header immediately after the orange 'Get a Quote' button.
issues.why_problem: For a local roofing site, search is less important than calling or requesting a quote. The icon pulls attention away from the main action.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: The right side of the header should end with the strongest action only: phone number and quote button, without a competing utility icon.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Remove the desktop search icon from the primary header or move search into the footer/resources area if it is still needed.
issues.plain_explanation: 报价按钮旁边放了搜索图标，会分散客户注意力。
issues.customer_impact: 客户来这里不是为了站内搜索，而是为了找屋顶公司；每个分散注意力的元素都会减少点击报价或拨打电话的机会。

issues.title: Roofing photo is underused
issues.what_observed: The desktop hero photo of a metal roof sits mostly behind and beside a large white text card, while the mobile screenshot shows no roofing image in the first screen.
issues.why_problem: Roofing is a trust-heavy service where customers want to see real workmanship quickly. When the image is secondary or absent on mobile, the page relies heavily on claims instead of visual proof.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A crisp project photo visible near the top on both desktop and mobile, with a small caption such as 'Metal roof installation, Brisbane' and trust proof nearby.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Use a stronger above-fold project image crop on desktop and add a compact real project image below the mobile CTA before the long service list.
issues.plain_explanation: 屋顶照片在电脑上被文字卡片压住，手机首屏几乎看不到实际工程照片。
issues.customer_impact: 屋顶客户会用照片判断手艺和专业度；如果看不到真实作品，只看到文字承诺，信任建立会变慢。

positive_observations: The logo is clear and professional in both desktop and mobile headers.
The phone number is visible on desktop and paired with a free quote message.
The hero copy includes useful trust proof, including '100+ 5 Star Reviews' and a 10-year workmanship guarantee.
redesign_priorities: 1. Add a visible sticky mobile call/quote action above the fold.
2. Place primary quote and phone buttons directly inside the hero area.
3. Simplify the desktop navigation so phone, reviews, projects, and quote are the main path.
